# Third-Party Notices

This repository ships source code and package manifests, not vendored Python
or Node dependency folders. Install-time dependencies retain their own
licences and notices.

Primary runtime dependencies:

- Jinja2 and MarkupSafe, Pallets Projects, BSD-derived licences.
- PySide6, Qt for Python, LGPL/commercial Qt licensing terms depending on
the installed distribution and use case.
- PyYAML, MIT licence.
- React, React DOM, Vite, and related JavaScript development dependencies,
as declared in
  `prototyping/compression_gui_react_seed_validated/compression_gui_react_seed_validated/package.json`
  and `package-lock.json`.

Materials not granted by the Apache-2.0 project licence include standards
documents, third-party logos or trademarks, generated user outputs, and any
external libraries installed by package managers.
